india_trends.title: Power Finance Corporation Q4 results 2026 LIVE: What to expect from PSU stock's March quarter show?

india_trends.title: Berger Paints share price jumps over 9% after Q4 Results. Should you buy, sell or hold?
india_trends.summary: Berger Paints shares rose over 9% on 13 May after a 27.52% increase in Q4 net profit to ₹335.25 crore. Revenue reached ₹2,868.03 crore, up from ₹2,704.03 crore, while total expenses rose to ₹2,499 crore.

india_trends.summary: Texmaco Rail & Engineering shares rose sharply after reporting a 45% rise in Q4 net profit. india_trends.title: Vodafone Idea share price rises around 4% after board meet for fundraising announced; to declare Q4 results on this date
india_trends.summary: Vodafone Idea shares surged on May 13 after announcing a board meeting to discuss a fundraising proposal and FY26 financial results. The stock rose 3.7% to ₹12.33 as investors welcomed plans to raise capital and address AGR dues.

india_trends.title: Jio Platforms appoints Akash Ambani as managing director ahead of IPO
india_trends.summary: In a key pre-IPO move, Jio Platforms has appointed Akash Ambani as managing director for five years, as the company moves closer to filing its DRHP with Sebi for a blockbuster listing.
